branches.name: Sciences
branches.description: PSL Sciences, including the legendary École Normale Supérieure (ENS), is a world leader in theoretical physics, mathematics, and molecular biology.

branches.name: Engineering
branches.description: Mines Paris-PSL is one of France's top 'Grandes Écoles' of engineering, focusing on energy, materials, and industrial management.

branches.name: Arts
branches.description: Integrating Fine Arts and Design schools, PSL offers a unique research-based artistic education in the heart of Paris.

branches.name: Humanities
branches.description: PSL Humanities research is world-class, spanning history, philosophy, and classical studies.

branches.name: Social Sciences
branches.description: Focusing on multidisciplinary social research and economics at the Dauphine-PSL campus.

branches.name: Arts & Humanities
branches.description: The Sorbonne is iconic for its letters and humanities departments, historical centers of French intellectual life.

branches.name: Science
branches.description: The Faculty of Science and Engineering at Sorbonne is a leader in marine biology, robotics, and climate science.

branches.name: Medicine
branches.description: Sorbonne Medicine is one of the most prestigious in Europe, with strong clinical integration across Paris hospitals.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: Partnering with Panthéon-Assas, Sorbonne offers premier legal studies with a focus on European and public law.

branches.name: Social Sciences
branches.description: Dynamic programs in sociology, geography, and information sciences through the CELSA institute.

branches.name: Business
branches.description: HEC Paris is the legendary leader of French business education, consistently ranked as the top business school in Europe.

branches.name: Finance
branches.description: The Master in International Finance at HEC is world-renowned for its placement in top investment banks.

branches.name: Management
branches.description: The Grand École MiM program is a highly selective track for future global leaders.

branches.name: Entrepreneurship
branches.description: HEC's startup incubator at Station F is the largest in the world, fostering deep ties with the tech ecosystem.

branches.name: Marketing
branches.description: Specialized programs in creative and digital marketing strategy.

branches.name: Engineering
branches.description: L'X is the most prestigious engineering school in France, known for its rigorous mathematics and leadership training under military status.

branches.name: Mathematics
branches.description: The center of the 'French School' of mathematics, home to multiple Fields Medalists.

branches.name: Physics
branches.description: World-class research in plasma physics, optics, and high-energy particles.

branches.name: Economics
branches.description: Focusing on quantitative economics and data science for policy.

branches.name: Multi-Disciplinary Science
branches.description: The innovative Bachelor of Science program, taught entirely in English for international students.

branches.name: International Relations
branches.description: The Paris School of International Affairs (PSIA) is a world-class center for global policy and diplomacy.

branches.name: Political Science
branches.description: Sciences Po's historical core, training countless world leaders and social thinkers.

branches.name: Law
branches.description: The Law School at Sciences Po focuses on the economic and geopolitical dimensions of law.

branches.name: Economics
branches.description: A research-focused economics department specializing in political economy and inequality.

branches.name: Sociology
branches.description: Leading research in urbanism, labor, and sociology of education.
